Package org.eventb.core.seqprover.tests

Class ProverChecksTests

java.lang.Object
org.eventb.core.seqprover.tests.ProverChecksTests
public class ProverChecksTests extends Object
Test cases for the static methods in ProverChecks.

These checks are rather minimal since the methods to be tested are themselves test methods.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    testCheckNoPredicateVariable()
    Tests the correctness of the ProverChecks.checkNoPredicateVariable(Predicate) and ProverChecks.checkNoPredicateVariable(Collection) methods.
    void
    testCheckSequentFailure()
    Tests the correct failure of the ProverChecks.checkSequent(org.eventb.core.seqprover.IProverSequent) method.
    void
    testCheckSequentSuccess()
    Tests the correct success of the ProverChecks.checkSequent(org.eventb.core.seqprover.IProverSequent) method.
    void
    testGenRuleJustifications()
    Tests the correctness of the ProverChecks#genRuleJustifications(org.eventb.core.seqprover.IProofRule) method.

    • testCheckSequentFailure

      Tests the correct failure of the ProverChecks.checkSequent(org.eventb.core.seqprover.IProverSequent) method.
